summary: The test suite provides solid coverage of core artifact retention policies (max-age, keep-latest-N, max-total-size) with 23 bats tests plus comprehensive workflow validation. Tests are well-organized by policy type with clear naming and good use of reference-time for deterministic testing. Main strengths: thorough input validation, combined policy testing, size formatting verification. Main weaknesses: limited edge case coverage (zero values, empty files, tie-breaking in same-epoch artifacts, all-deleted/all-retained scenarios, GB formatting verification); fixture files referenced but not shown in submission, making complete verification impossible; test harness mixes workflow structure validation with artifact cleanup unit tests, conflating concerns. Would reliably catch regressions in retention logic and output format but might miss subtle sorting bugs or boundary condition failures. Coverage of main task requirements is strong; rigor is moderate due to sparse edge-case testing.
